text:
17 PRs merged this week. mostly a massive community harvest—we added a ton of new apps built by you all to the showcase (homework solvers, roleplay companions, infinite yield games).

on the infra side: we cured vision API blindness (no more [object Object] staring back at you), sanitized Vertex schemas, and removed default system prompts from general models. they can just be themselves now.

oh, and the playground selector finally shows actual human-readable model names. small wins.

everything's live at pollinations.ai 🌸

#pollinations #opensource #aitools #pixelart #creativecoding #indiedev #buildinpublic #webdev #codinglife #openweight
